design_philosophy.core_concept: A blend of Swiss Precision (Inter) and Classical Authority (Cormorant Garamond). High-contrast, data-dense, yet typographically elegant.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'font-heading' for all H1-H3. Weights: 600 or 700. Tracking: tight (-0.02em).
usage_rules.body: Use 'font-body' for all interface text. Weights: 400 (regular) or 500 (medium).
usage_rules.data: Use 'font-mono' for all numbers, KPIs, and code snippets. Weight: 500.
usage_rules.overline: Uppercase, tracking-widest (0.2em), font-body, text-xs, font-semibold, text-muted-foreground.

usage.gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use subtle 'glow' effects with 'shadow-[0_0_30px_-5px_rgba(255,106,0,0.15)]'.
usage.glass: Use 'bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10' for overlays and sticky headers.

dashboard_grid.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use 'h-full' on children. No jagged bottoms.

spacing.dashboard: Compact. p-4 or p-6 for cards. gap-4 for grids.
spacing.marketing: Generous. p-8 or p-12 for sections. gap-8 for grids.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-card border border-border hover:bg-accent hover:text-white rounded-lg

cards.default: bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all duration-200

priority_inbox.layout: Command Center. Split pane: List on left (4 cols), Detail/Action on right (8 cols).
features: Inverted Pyramid Hierarchy: Alerts > Key Messages > Routine.
AI Summary: Top section with type-writer effect summary.
Keyboard Shortcuts: Visible hints (e.g., 'Press J/K to navigate').
Side-by-side Agenda: Calendar widget left, Agenda list right.
Visual Density: High. Use color strips for event types.
Sticky Sidebar: Navigation on left that highlights active section.
Form Density: Group related fields in cards.
Comparative Charts: Radar/Spider charts for competency mapping.
Competitor Cards: Horizontal cards with logo, score, and 'Threat Level' badge.

universal_rules.accessibility: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for text. All interactive elements must have :focus-visible styles.
universal_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case).
universal_rules.motion: No 'transition: all'. Use specific properties. Duration: 200ms-300ms. Easing: ease-out.
universal_rules.icons: Use 'lucide-react'. Stroke width: 1.5px for elegance, 2px for UI controls.
universal_rules.toasts: Use 'sonner' for all notifications. Success = Green, Error = Red, Info = Blue.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Read this file completely before starting.
2. Respect the 'Old Money Tech' font pairing: Cormorant (Headings) + Inter (Body).
3. Use the defined color variables from 'tailwind.config.js' (primary, background, etc.).
4. For the 'Priority Inbox', implement a split-view layout.
5. For 'Business DNA', ensure the form saves automatically and provides visual feedback.
6. Do not break existing functionality. Extend, don't replace, unless the UI is 'hyper basic'.
7. Ensure all new components are responsive (mobile-first).
